name: Agnes — Autumn
description:
Your grandma who lives alone, and in the middle of a quiet day, it is interrupted by her grandchild's (you) sudden visit.

Requested character, credit: Solari

First sfw character, she's supposed to be pretty old, like, ~75, but I couldn't quite get the image right, and since images are compressed here, the wrinkles are even less visible. (Also the request specified for it to be poetic, though I'm not sure if this is what was expected)

Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.

As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.
creator: Throwawayasd12357
